item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
What's new

  • Polished release: app icon, About panel, and built-in auto-updates.

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
What's new

  • Window Mirror: capture any other app window as a live floating widget.
  • Markdown notes: the note widget now renders markdown — headings, lists, clickable checklists, quotes, and code blocks.
  • Web fullscreen, fixed: video fullscreen (e.g. YouTube) now stays inside the widget instead of taking over the screen.
  • Edge parking: shove widgets past the screen edge to tuck them away; snap to edges now applies reliably on drop.
  • Widgets restored at login can now be closed normally, and closing a web widget reliably stops audio playback.
  • Removed the Clock/Timer and System Monitor widgets and the camera shape options.

item.title: Version 1.1.1
item.description:
What's new

  • Throw widgets like native PiP: flick a widget toward a screen edge or corner and it glides there, keeping a small margin from the edge.
  • Edge magnetism reworked: snapping now applies reliably when you drop a widget near an edge; deliberately shoving it past the edge parks it with a grab handle still visible.
  • Session restore fixed: quitting the app no longer wipes the saved widget session; widgets lost offscreen are rescued back into view on restart.
  • Window Mirror: the window picker now only lists real application windows — no more Dock, wallpaper, or system overlays.
  • The video widget no longer offers its own picture-in-picture button.
